name: Doc Boyle's Barbq
recipeIngredient: Boiled, cooled, shredded by your own little fingers so as to be stringy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in oil until lightly browned.
2. Add dry ingredients and blend in.
3. Add the remainder of the ingredients.
4. Simmer slowly for 1 to 2 hours.
